name: Curry Plus
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cubed cooked meat (turkey, ham, lamb, or chicken)
1/3 cup chopped walnuts, pecans or peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, melt margarine over medium-high heat.
2. Stir-fry onion, garlic and curry powder for 5 minutes.
3. Add flour and salt (if not using ham).
4. Add cubed cooked meat, yogurt, and chicken broth.
5. Cook and stir until thick and bubbly; do not bring to a hard boil.
6. Continue cooking for 1 minute more.
7. Stir in chopped mixed dried fruits and nuts.
8. Heat through and season to taste.
9. Serve over hot cooked rice.
